This is the final post of the Finance and Investing series.
In this post, I teach how to analyze a business using Apple as an example.
You can download the presentation slides from [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.files.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F09%2Fbusiness-analysis_-apple.pdf&sr=1&signature=173cfd6e15fe55cc2d73c35036a3c105&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z) and [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.files.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F09%2Fbusiness-analysis_-apple.xlsx&sr=1&signature=64b016f766c754fcae4b02682692523e&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z).
You can watch the previous lectures at [Joys of compounding](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2F02%2Fteaching-my-son-finance-and-investing-part-1-joys-of-compounding%2F&sr=1&signature=fe477fa388b4a4e18c611fdd043619e2&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z), [What's getting in our way](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2F06%2Fteaching-my-son-finance-and-investing-part-2-whats-getting-in-your-way%2F&sr=1&signature=fe159ba77dc613e9afbd37fbcd2a65b5&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z), [How to think about investing](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2F20%2Fteaching-my-son-finance-and-investing-part-3-how-to-think-about-investing%2F&sr=1&signature=8b38af405b05c9147afe386ece1f72e5&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z), and [Indexing](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F07%2F23%2Fteaching-my-son-finance-and-investing-part-4-the-core-indexing%2F&sr=1&signature=ed7c48bb10a5362d847a8c61af656e31&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z).
